MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Shree Jalaram Lodging LP, is present. Represented by Jina Patel.
Attorney Michael Heath appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kenneth Rudolph present.
Attorney Margaret Allen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-07-2011 is vacated.
